title: Fire in Bangkok Bar Was a Death Trap With Inaccessible Exits and Flammable Foam
summary_full: Huge flames tore out of the entrance to the venue, which one investigator said had used inappropriate material for soundproofing. More than two dozen people died.
summary_public: Huge flames tore out of the entrance to the venue, which one investigator said had used inappropriate material for soundproofing. More than two dozen people died.
